label: cvaWelcome
text1: In this activity, you're going to look for words that match in meaning.

label: cvaYouWillSee
text1: You will see a sentence with an underlined word.

label: cvaYourJob
text1: Your job is to choose the word with the nearest meaning to the underlined word.

label: cvaWordsMakeSense
text1: All of the words make sense in the sentence, but only one word has a meaning that matches.

label: cvaPractice
text1: Remember to choose the best match for the underlined word.

label: cvaYoureReady
text1: Remember to read the sentences and the choices carefully.

label: break4
text1: You are an expert at this!
